node.text: John joined a firefighting brigade to give back to his community.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "inspired to start volunteering") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Being in an environment with motivated people gave John renewed energy and purpose, inspiring him to make a bigger difference.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "inspired to start volunteering") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: John had his first call-out with the firefighting brigade last Sunday to help those in need.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "inspired to start volunteering") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: John helped renovate a rundown community center back home last year.

node.text: John shared that he had a doll in his childhood that made him feel better, reminding him to look out for others when they're feeling down.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "inspired to start volunteering") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.92)

node.text: John attended a convention with colleagues who share his passion for using tech for good in the community.

node.text: John finds volunteering satisfying and valuable.

node.text: John is passionate about making a positive impact in his community through raising awareness and starting conversations.
